scripts.dev: node scripts/info.js && concurrently -n docker,mobile -c blue,green "docker compose up --build" "cd mobile && npx expo start"
scripts.front:back: concurrently -n api,web -c yellow,cyan "npm run back" "npm run front"
scripts.mobile:back: concurrently -n api,mobile -c yellow,green "npm run back" "npm run mobile"
scripts.all: concurrently -n api,web,mobile -c yellow,cyan,green "npm run back" "npm run front" "npm run mobile"
scripts.install:all: cd nestjs && npm install && cd ../reactjs && npm install && cd ../mobile && npm install
